ops.body: Resolved by 0e946a0 (plan-trip.js rebuilt as the reference graph walker over trip compile/explain — no more invented status keys) and validated live: two full walker dispatches on the warm-beachy demo trip (wf_5fba3e0c-28e, wf_7cb872f0-d7d) completed all 14 nodes including the hybrid onward/bridge lane, finalists written. Both criteria met. Caveat for future sandbox runs: a scratch copy needs GETAWAY_HOME prefixed in BOTH command templates — `const CLI` (judgment/status agents) AND `uvCmd` (runner nodes); patching only CLI sends every runner to the real ~/.getaway, whose pre-v2 prefs exit 3.
